mnemonics: Players Plan Payouts: Game theory is the study of how Players Plan their actions to maximize their Payouts.
keyPoints: Game theory studies strategic interactions between rational decision-makers.
Rational choice theory assumes individuals make decisions that maximize their expected utility.
The outcome for a player depends not only on their own actions but also on the actions of others.
commonMistakes: Assuming rationality means players always make the 'best' moral or social choice, rather than the most self-interested one.
Confusing a player's payoff (their utility) with the actual monetary or physical outcome of the game.
